en: "Come, let us return to the LORD; for he has torn us, that he may heal us; he has struck us down, and he will bind us up.
zh: “來吧！讓我們回轉歸向耶和華； 因為，他雖然撕裂了我們，但必定醫治我們； 他雖然擊傷了我們，卻必替我們裹傷。

en: After two days he will revive us; on the third day he will raise us up, that we may live before him.
zh: 兩天以後，他要使我們復原； 第三天，他使我們起來， 我們就可以活在他的面前。

en: Let us know; let us press on to know the LORD; his going out is sure as the dawn; he will come to us as the showers, as the spring rains that water the earth."
zh: 讓我們認識，竭力追求認識耶和華。 他必定出現，像晨光一樣， 他必臨到我們，如雨水一般， 又像滋潤大地的春雨。

en: What shall I do with you, O Ephraim? What shall I do with you, O Judah? Your love is like a morning cloud, like the dew that goes early away.
zh: “以法蓮啊！我要怎樣待你呢？ 猶大啊，我要怎樣待你呢？ 你們的愛心像早晨的雲霧； 又像瞬即消逝的朝露。

en: Therefore I have hewn them by the prophets; I have slain them by the words of my mouth, and my judgment goes forth as the light.
zh: 因此，我藉眾先知砍碎他們， 用我口中的話殺戮他們； 我的審判必如光一般發出。

en: For I desire steadfast love and not sacrifice, the knowledge of God rather than burnt offerings.
zh: 我喜愛憐恤，不喜愛祭祀； 我喜愛人認識 神的知識，勝過人獻的燔祭。

en: But like Adam they transgressed the covenant; there they dealt faithlessly with me.
zh: 可是他們卻在亞當城背約， 在那裡向我行詭詐。

en: Gilead is a city of evildoers, tracked with blood.
zh: 基列是作孽之人的城， 他們的腳蹤染滿了血漬。

en: As robbers lie in wait for a man, so the priests band together; they murder on the way to Shechem; they commit villainy.
zh: 在往示劍的路上，祭司結黨殺害人， 就像埋伏路旁的強盜； 他們行了邪惡的事。

en: In the house of Israel I have seen a horrible thing; Ephraim's whoredom is there; Israel is defiled.
zh: 在以色列家！我看見了可怕的事； 那裡有以法蓮的淫行，以色列被玷污了。

en: For you also, O Judah, a harvest is appointed, when I restore the fortunes of my people.
zh: 猶大啊！我使我的子民歸回的時候， 必有為你定下的一個收割時期。”
